# Let's load the quranic_verses.json file and search for matching ayah text.
import json, sys, re, unicodedata

qfile = "/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json"
with open(qfile, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    qdata = json.load(f)

len(qdata), type(qdata[0]) if qdata else None

# Let's implement normalization and search for entries matching snippet or full substring.
import re
arabic_diacritics = re.compile('[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]')  # includes common harakat and other marks
tatweel = '\u0640'
def normalize_ar(text):
    if not isinstance(text, str):
        return ''
    # remove tatweel and diacritics
    s = text.replace(tatweel, '')
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s)
    # unify alef variants
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ى','ي').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ؤ','و')
    # remove punctuation and stars and parentheses and quotes and commas and etc
    s = re.sub(r'[\u060C\u061B\u061F\.\,\;\:\!\?\-\—\*\·\"\'\(\)\[\]\{\}«»\/\\\–\•\–]', ' ', s)
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s).strip()
    return s

# Normalize database ayahs and build list
norm_db = []
for entry in qdata:
    norm_text = normalize_ar(entry['ayah_text'])
    norm_db.append((norm_text, entry))

# Provided full substring
full_span = "لَا يَغُرَّنَّكَ تَقَلُّبُ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا فِي الْبِلَادِ * مَتَاعٌ قَلِيلٌ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ * وَلَا يَحْزُنكَ الَّذِينَ يُسَارِعُونَ فِي الْكُفْرِ إِنَّهُمْ لَن يَضُرُّوا اللَّهَ شَيْئًا يُرِيدُ اللَّهُ أَلَّا يَجْعَلَ لَهُمْ حَظًّا فِي الْآخِرَةِ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌ"
snippet = "لَا يَغُرّ...بٌ عَظِيمٌ"

norm_full = normalize_ar(full_span)
norm_snip = normalize_ar(snippet)
norm_full, norm_snip[:200]

# show the matching entries for the first phrase
find_by_phrase("مَتَاعٌ قَلِيلٌ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ")
find_by_phrase("وَلَا يَحْزُنكَ الَّذِينَ يُسَارِعُونَ فِي الْكُفْرِ")

# find entries for surah 3 ayahs around 170-200
surah3 = [e for e in qdata if e['surah_id']==3]
# sort by ayah_id and print the range
surah3_sorted = sorted(surah3, key=lambda x: x['ayah_id'])
for e in surah3_sorted[170:201]:
    print(e['ayah_id'], e['ayah_text'])

# Inspect Surah Hud verses around 19-20
hud = [e for e in qdata if e['surah_name']=='هود']
hud_sorted = sorted(hud, key=lambda x: x['ayah_id'])
for e in hud_sorted[15:22]:
    print(e['ayah_id'], e['ayah_text'])

# Retrieve the three DB strings
entries_map = {}
for e in qdata:
    key = (e['surah_id'], e['ayah_id'])
    entries_map[key] = e['ayah_text']

# get the exact texts
e1 = entries_map.get((3,196))
e2 = entries_map.get((16,117))
e3 = entries_map.get((3,176))
e1, e2, e3

# define similarity metrics
def tokenize_norm(s):
    s_norm = normalize_ar(s)
    return s_norm.split()

candidate = e1 + " " + e2 + " " + e3
full = full_span

tokens_c = tokenize_norm(candidate)
tokens_f = tokenize_norm(full)
set_c = set(tokens_c)
set_f = set(tokens_f)
intersection = set_c & set_f
precision = len(intersection) / len(set_c) if set_c else 0
recall = len(intersection) / len(set_f) if set_f else 0
f1 = (2*precision*recall/(precision+recall)) if (precision+recall)>0 else 0

# Also compute normalized LCS at char level
def lcs_length(a,b):
    # dynamic programming
    m, n = len(a), len(b)
    # to save memory convert to lists and use only 2 rows
    prev = [0]*(n+1)
    for i in range(1,m+1):
        cur = [0]*(n+1)
        for j in range(1,n+1):
            if a[i-1]==b[j-1]:
                cur[j] = prev[j-1]+1
            else:
                cur[j] = max(prev[j], cur[j-1])
        prev = cur
    return prev[n]

a_norm = normalize_ar(candidate)
b_norm = normalize_ar(full)
lcs_len = lcs_length(a_norm, b_norm)
lcs_ratio = lcs_len / max(len(a_norm), len(b_norm))

tokens_c[:30], tokens_f[:30], f1, lcs_len, lcs_ratio, len(a_norm), len(b_norm)

# compute again
candidate = combined
full = full_span
tokens_c = tokenize_norm(candidate)
tokens_f = tokenize_norm(full)
intersection = set(tokens_c) & set(tokens_f)
precision = len(intersection) / len(set(tokens_c))
recall = len(intersection) / len(set(tokens_f))
f1 = (2*precision*recall/(precision+recall))
a_norm = normalize_ar(candidate)
b_norm = normalize_ar(full)
lcs_len = lcs_length(a_norm, b_norm)
lcs_ratio = lcs_len / max(len(a_norm), len(b_norm))
f1, lcs_ratio
